ddls:
CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repo_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the repository was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the repository was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the repository (e.g., ahead, behind) */,
  "ahead_by" INTEGER /* Number of commits the repository is ahead of the main branch */,
  "behind_by" INTEGER /* Number of commits the repository is behind the main branch */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary programming language used in the repository */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the repository is released */,
  "default_branch" TEXT /* Default branch of the repository */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the repository is private */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the repository (public, private, internal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repositories_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the owner (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the owner account was created */,
  "last_active_at" TEXT /* Date and time the owner was last active */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL to the owner's avatar */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forks" (
  "fork_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fork */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository being forked */,
  "fork_name" TEXT /* Name of the fork */,
  "fork_owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the fork */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the fork was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the fork was last updated */,
  "default_branch" TEXT /* Default branch of the fork */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the fork is private */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the fork (public, private, internal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fork_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forks_fork_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("fork_owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forks_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disk_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disk usage entry */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "disk_usage_kb" INTEGER /* Disk usage in kilobytes */,
  "measured_at" TEXT /* Date and time the disk usage was measured */,
  "storage_provider" TEXT /* Storage provider used for the repository */,
  "storage_cost" TEXT /* Cost associated with the storage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disk_usage_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stargazers" (
  "stargazer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stargazer entry */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who starred the repository */,
  "starred_at" TEXT /* Date and time the repository was starred */,
  "unstarred_at" TEXT /* Date and time the repository was unstarred (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stargazer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stargazers_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stargazers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchers" (
  "watcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watcher entry */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is watching the repository */,
  "watched_at" TEXT /* Date and time the repository was watched */,
  "unwatched_at" TEXT /* Date and time the repository was unwatched (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchers_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "issue_number" INTEGER /* Issue number */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "closed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was closed */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the issue */,
  "labels" TEXT /* JSON array of labels associated with the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the commit */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message of the commit */,
  "committed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the commit was made */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the commit */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch on which the commit was made */,
  "commit_type" TEXT /* Type of commit (e.g., feature, bug fix, documentation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_requests" (
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "pr_number" INTEGER /* Pull request number */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the pull request */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pull request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pull request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pull request was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the pull request (e.g., open, closed, merged) */,
  "merged_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pull request was merged */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the pull request */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the pull request */,
  "merge_commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the commit that merged the pull request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, contributor, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_active_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last active */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's avatar */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was last updated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the project ended (if applicable) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the repository */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the repository was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, clone, push) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the repository */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repo_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the commit associated with the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "tags" TEXT /* JSON array of tags associated with the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repo_versions_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repo_contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor entry */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a contributor */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., commit, issue, pull request) */,
  "contribution_count" INTEGER /* Number of contributions */,
  "last_contribution_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last contribution */,
  "contribution_score" INTEGER /* A score representing the overall contribution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repo_contributors_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repo_contributors_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repo_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner entry */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is an owner */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the owner (e.g., main, secondary) */,
  "last_activity_at" TEXT /* Date and time the owner last performed an activity in the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repo_owners_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repo_owners_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)
